title: レースの中に、ドリームを

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The title of Umamusume of the Year is a great
honor bestowed on the Umamusume who shines
brightest in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order to bring happiness to a great number of
people, Taiki Shuttle resolves to seize this crown
for herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus begins her spirited sprint toward a grand
dream!
